onlyInPassA.key: authority|order.config.SecurityConfig|authority|allowsCrossOrigin|cors registry allows all origins/methods/headers, credentials false, maxAge 3600, on /**
authority|other.config.SecurityConfig|authority|allowsCrossOrigin|cors registry allows all origins/methods/headers, credentials false, maxAge 3600, on /**

contract|other.entity.Order|specification|shapedAs|equals compares own getBoughtDate() against both other.getBoughtDate() and other.getTravelDate() (own getTravelDate() is not compared to other.getTravelDate()), plus accountId, contactsName, contactsDocumentNumber, documentType, trainNumber, coachNumber, seatClass, seatNumber, from, to, status, price
contract|other.entity.QueryInfo|specification|ensures|enableTravelDateQuery/enableBoughtDateQuery/enableStateQuery booleans gate which date-range/state fields OrderOtherServiceImpl.queryOrders reads

contract|other.service.OrderOtherServiceImpl|specification|requires|create() and addNewOrder() reject (Response status 0) when accountOrders.contains(order) is true via Order.equals, else assign a new random UUID id before saving
effect|notification.mq.RabbitSend|effect|publishes|queue=Queues.queueName via AmqpTemplate.convertAndSend, val logged before send
effect|notification.service.MailService|effect|callsProvider|JavaMailSender.send with freemarker-rendered MimeMessage body loaded from classpath /templates
effect|other.init.InitData|effect|writesTo|seeds orders_other via OrderOtherService.create with a fixed order1 (price=100, status=OrderStatus.PAID) on application startup (CommandLineRunner.run)

effect|other.service.OrderOtherServiceImpl|effect|callsProvider|POST http://ts-station-service/api/v1/stationservice/stations/namelist via RestTemplate.exchange, host resolved by literal string concatenation with the Nacos-registered service name
relation|order.controller.OrderController|static|dependsOn|autowired OrderService, interface/impl not in this chunk's assigned files
relation|other.entity.OrderAlterInfo|static|dependsOn|wraps newOrderInfo:Order, defaulted to new Order() in the no-arg constructor
relation|other.service.OrderOtherServiceImpl|static|dependsOn|autowired OrderOtherRepository used by all persistence-touching methods
relation|ts-notification-service|static|dependsOn|nacos discovery server-addr list, default headless nacos-0..2 cluster hosts

semantic|notification.service.NotificationServiceImpl|semantic|meansInUse|template=order_cancel_success.ftl selected for OrderCancelSuccess notification, model reduced to username and price only (no trip fields)
semantic|notification.service.NotificationServiceImpl|semantic|meansInUse|template=order_changed_success.ftl selected for OrderChangedSuccess notification, same model shape as OrderCreateSuccess
semantic|notification.service.NotificationServiceImpl|semantic|meansInUse|template=order_create_success.ftl selected for OrderCreateSuccess notification, model adds orderNumber in place of price

semantic|notification.service.NotificationServiceImpl|semantic|meansInUse|template=preserve_success.ftl selected for PreserveSuccess notification, model carries username/startPlace/endPlace/startTime/date/seatClass/seatNumber/price

semantic|order.config.SecurityConfig|semantic|meansInUse|method-restricted matchers for POST-PUT-DELETE on /api/v1/orderservice/order and /admin are declared before the broad permit-all matcher for /api/v1/orderservice/order/**
semantic|other.config.SecurityConfig|semantic|meansInUse|permit-all matcher for /api/v1/orderOtherService/orderOther/** is declared before the method-restricted matchers for the same base path
semantic|other.entity.Order|semantic|meansInUse|String price field defaults to literal 0.0 in the no-arg constructor
semantic|other.entity.Order|semantic|meansInUse|int status field defaults to OrderStatus.PAID.getCode() in the no-arg constructor
semantic|other.entity.QueryInfo|semantic|meansInUse|int state field set to -1 by disableStateQuery to select the no-state-filter branch downstream
semantic|other.service.OrderOtherServiceImpl|semantic|meansInUse|int 0 selects the not-found-or-rejected branch of the Response envelope, data is typically null or a sentinel value
semantic|other.service.OrderOtherServiceImpl|semantic|meansInUse|int 1 selects the result-carrying success branch of the Response envelope
semantic|other.service.OrderOtherServiceImpl|semantic|meansInUse|order counted as valid when status equals OrderStatus.NOTPAID, PAID, or COLLECTED code

semantic|other.service.OrderOtherServiceImpl|semantic|meansInUse|order.getPrice() String value is returned as-is in Response data with no parsing or arithmetic in this service; the not-found branch of getOrderPrice returns the literal string -1.0
semantic|other.service.OrderOtherServiceImpl|semantic|meansInUse|orders with getStatus() >= OrderStatus.CHANGE.getCode() are excluded (continue) from the sold-ticket seat-class tally

semantic|other.service.OrderOtherServiceImpl|semantic|meansInUse|when qi.isEnableStateQuery() is true, tempOrder.getStatus() is compared for exact equality against qi.getState() to select the passing branch
semantic|ts-notification-service.application.yml|semantic|identifiedBy|email_password property falls back to a literal default value when the env var is unset
semantic|ts-order-other-service.application.yml|semantic|identifiedBy|ORDER_OTHER_MYSQL_PASSWORD property falls back to the literal value root when unset
state|notification.repository.NotifyRepository|state|persistsIn|NotifyInfo rows keyed by String id via CrudRepository (findById, findAll, deleteById)
state|other.entity.Order|state|persistsIn|orders_other table row identified by uuid id (jpa-uuid GenericGenerator)
state|other.repository.OrderOtherRepository|state|persistsIn|CrudRepository<Order,String> exposing findById, findAll, findByAccountId, findByTravelDateAndTrainNumber, deleteById
